name: agents_list_types
description: List available agent types that can be assigned tasks.

name: agents_assign_task
description: Assign a task to a named agent. If the agent doesn't exist yet, it is created automatically from the specified type. If it previously completed a task, a fresh instance is created (same name, new session, workspace persists).

type.description: The agent type — one of the types returned by agents_list_types.

slug.description: The agent's name. Use a short, descriptive, lowercase identifier (e.g., 'researcher', 'deep-dive'). The same slug always refers to the same agent.

objective.description: The task objective. Must include all information necessary for the agent to complete the task.

summary.description: A short summary for the task in the [Subject] [Action-er] format, under four words, e.g., "Laptop Finder", "Meal Planner"

title.description: Optional friendly title for the task.

options.description: Optional runtime configuration overrides. Supported keys depend on the agent type. Discover available options via agents_list_types.

name: agents_check_status
description: Check the status of all agents you have assigned tasks to. Returns agents by name (slug) with their current status and task outcomes.

name: agents_cancel
description: Cancel a named agent and any pending tasks.

slug.description: The name of the agent to cancel.

name: agents_send_event
description: Send a typed event to a named agent. The agent receives the event as a context update. Use this to provide additional instructions, clarifications, or data to a running agent.

slug.description: The name of the agent to send the event to.

type.description: The type of event (e.g., 'clarification', 'additional_context'). Choose descriptive, stable names.

message.description: Text payload delivered to the agent. Include all relevant details the agent needs to act on.

name: agents_await
description: Suspend execution until a context update arrives (e.g. an agent completes a task or a parent sends an event). Returns immediately if updates are already pending. Call this after assigning tasks to wait for their results.

slugs.description: Optional. Agent names to wait for. Currently informational — the function resumes on any context update.
